title: Update TX queuing to SLIP/sim for mesh-to-mesh, refactor lichend.rs forward, add tests
description: For local_mesh packets, queue to sim/SLIP TX channel instead of TUN. Update Gateway.run_* and lichend.rs forward fn to branch on is_local_mesh. Add unit/integration tests verifying SRH, recompress, and routing. Complete the mesh_to_mesh path per spec/05-routing.md. Part of project-LICHEN-lug0.
